HEALTHCARE-A.channel: WhatsApp/call for smaller clinics; email/call for hospital/diagnostics
HEALTHCARE-A.message:
Namaste {business_name} Team 👋

Many patient enquiries get missed because they come from different places — calls, WhatsApp, website forms and repeat follow-ups.

AICloudStrategist helps clinics set up a simple enquiry follow-up system so staff can see:
✅ who needs a callback
✅ what is pending
✅ which enquiries came from where
✅ daily owner/manager visibility

No heavy CRM. No patient medical data required for the first review.

Can we share a free 10-minute enquiry-leakage review for {business_name}?

— Anushka Bhattacharya
Director, AICloudStrategist
Website: https://aicloudstrategist.com
WhatsApp: +91 87963 02608
Voice line: +91 80654 80898
Email: contact@aicloudstrategist.com

PROF-A.message:
Namaste {business_name} Team,

Professional-service firms handle many client documents, reminders and follow-ups across email, WhatsApp and calls. The risk is scattered intake and missed client actions.

AICloudStrategist helps firms create secure, process-driven workflows:
✅ client intake tracking
✅ document collection reminders
✅ secure cloud folder structure
✅ pending task visibility
✅ basic email/domain/cloud hygiene review

We do not provide tax/legal advice — this is only technology and process support.
